raw:
## Completed
Implemented strict Definition of Done gating before Gate 2 auto-commit. Reviewer `unknown`/missing verdict now blocks done and withholds release commits. Activated this repo’s pre-ship reviewer gate and release commit gate.

## Files Changed
- `.pi/.gitignore` - unignores `.pi/foreman.json`
- `.pi/foreman.json` - adds pre-ship reviewer + release commit gates
- `extensions/foreman/done.ts` - new pure DoD evaluator/render/extractor
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - Gate 2 DoD evaluation before done/commit
- `extensions/foreman/ledger.ts` - generated `.pi/.gitignore` now preserves `foreman.json`
- `extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh` - DoD truth table/config tests
- `extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh` - deterministic direct foreman driver for acceptance test

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q 'claude-opus-4-8:xhigh' extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh
```

## Notes
Verification passed. `git check-ignore .pi/foreman.json` returns nothing.
